note: DESIGN MISMATCH DISCOVERED: cross-layer fitting does not match LOAO/LODO protocol which uses best-layer per architecture. For non-fine-tuned LMs, kappa-logit relationship across layers is non-monotone (different layers serve different functional roles). See cti_smollm2_cross_dataset.json for corrected design.

datasets_tested.note: PRIMARY TEST (in training set, new arch)
datasets_tested.interpretation: Non-monotone cross-layer pattern. Design mismatch. Best layer (layer 18: kappa=0.031, q_norm=0.681) shows moderate discrimination.

r=0.804 PASSES PR3 threshold (r>=0.75). alpha=8.85 outside pre-reg range [2.43,3.29]. Directionally correct but slope inflated vs cross-architecture calibration. SmolLM2 at K=151 shows positive kappa-logit relationship (r=0.80).

datasets_tested.note: CRASHED: minds14 is an AUDIO dataset requiring torchcodec/FFmpeg. Wrong dataset selection (was expected to be text).

post_hoc_finding: clinc_oos K=151 shows r=0.804 (passes direction test). The LOAO-equivalent test requires cross-dataset at best-layer (not cross-layer). See cti_smollm2_cross_dataset.json for corrected replication.
